title: The result of SELECT ... IN is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(20), value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO B (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'item1', 10.5);
INSERT INTO B (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'item2', NULL);
INSERT INTO B (id, name, value) VALUES (3, 'item3', 20.0);
SELECT name FROM B WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM B WHERE id = 4);
key_bug_features: SELECT ... IN with non-existent value causes incorrect results
